name: Allbirds
voice: Calm, plain-spoken, sustainability-forward. Uses first-person plural ('we', 'our') and treats material origin (eucalyptus tree fiber, merino wool, sugarcane) as the headline product feature. Sentences are short and declarative. Avoids fashion-industry jargon and superlatives. Tone is closer to a Patagonia field guide than a sneaker drop — earnest, factual, quietly confident.
